CLAUSE.NAME: ACPT_DefPaymentCollections_remarks
CLAUSE.value:
We remain at your disposal for any questions.
In case that presenting party will not accept the reduction or non payment of their commisions and charges,we shall revert to this matter again.
The Baloise Bank SoBa will debit your account (on due date)** accordingly.
The ...... * will debit your account (on due date)** accordingly.
name of the cooperation bank will be added manually
may be deleted in case of sight payment
